name: clay-workbench
description: The complete Clay.com workbook plugin for Claude Code. Hybrid router skill with 16 sub-skills covering the full Clay workflow — hygiene (pre-Clay list cleaning, ongoing CRM data hygiene), build (ABM lists, account research, prospect research, multi-provider enrichment waterfalls), score (ICP fit + composite buying-signal intent), activate (outbound copy + Sending Gate + sequencer push, real-time inbound routing, recurring trigger monitoring), quality + cost (Claygent prompt iteration, credit forecasting + provider comparison, portfolio-wide cost audit, single-workbook troubleshooting), and persistence (save/load/version reusable workbook templates). MCP-first execution via mcp__claude_ai_Clay__* tools with manual UI walkthrough fallback. Mandatory credit pre-flight, ICP-gates-before-credits enforcement, client-voice detection.

skills.name: clay-workbench
skills.description: Master router — auto-detects intent and routes to the right Clay sub-skill

skills.name: clay-list-clean
skills.description: Pre-Clay list hygiene — domain/email/title/geo normalization + dedup + suppression filter. Always run first on raw lists; cuts burn 30–60%.

skills.name: clay-data-hygiene
skills.description: Ongoing CRM-side hygiene — recurring dedup + decay detection + enrichment refresh queue via 3 linked tables (crm_record_health, crm_duplicates, refresh_queue).

skills.name: clay-abm-list
skills.description: Build account-keyed ABM target lists with firmographic + trigger gating

skills.name: clay-account-research
skills.description: Deep multi-source account briefs — priorities + news + hiring + leadership + competitive + entry-point hypothesis per company.

skills.name: clay-prospect-research
skills.description: Deep person-level dossiers — POVs + activity + role scope + warm path + personalized entry line per contact.

skills.name: clay-enrich-waterfall
skills.description: Multi-provider email + phone + LinkedIn waterfall with graceful exit

skills.name: clay-icp-score
skills.description: Composite 10-point ICP fit score (firmographic + persona) with routing by band

skills.name: clay-buying-signals
skills.description: Composite multi-source buying-signal intent score — fuses intent data, web visits, content engagement, hiring, funding, tech adoption, leadership moves into a single time-decayed score with mandatory backfill discrimination test.

skills.name: clay-outbound
skills.description: Personalized outbound copy + Sending Gate + sequencer push with client-voice detection

skills.name: clay-inbound-routing
skills.description: Real-time webhook enrichment + scoring + routing + Slack alerting

skills.name: clay-signal-monitor
skills.description: Recurring single-source trigger monitoring (job changes, hiring, funding, leadership, tech adoption, intent) with severity-classified Slack/CRM routing.

skills.name: clay-claygent-iterator
skills.description: Structured 5 → 25 → 100 row Claygent prompt iteration loop with scorecard (PASS %, FABRICATED %, credits/row). Mandatory before scaling any Claygent column.

skills.name: clay-credits
skills.description: Proactive credit forecasting + multi-mix provider cost comparison + workbook ROI ranking with reallocation recommendation.

skills.name: clay-cost-audit
skills.description: Portfolio-wide 12-check audit across every workbook — Global Rules violations + waste + ROI laggards with ranked fixes and projected savings.

skills.name: clay-troubleshoot
skills.description: Diagnose broken or expensive workbooks — root cause + fix recipe + cost-savings estimate (single-workbook reactive).

skills.name: clay-template-library
skills.description: Persistence layer — save, load, list, diff, version, and share workbook templates with anonymization rules.

global_rules_summary: Gates Before Credits — ICP gate required before any paid column
Sending Gate Before Export — required before any sequencer push
Data Unification — score on full rows, not fragments
ICP Qualification First — cheapest-signal disqualification before enrichment
Free Before Paid — try free sources first in every waterfall
Never Assume — Always Ask — run 8-question intake; offer options when user defers
Clay-Managed vs Own API Key — state which side each column hits
Multiple Sending Steps — outbound assumes 2–4 step cadence, not one-shot
